type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: This facility services a government office complex which saw a significant reduction in demand as most buildings were unoccupied during the pandemic.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Facility services a government office complex which saw a significant reduction in demand due to many of the buildings being unoccupied during the pandemic. 
The facility also removed two large oil fuel storage tanks in 2019 and so did not contribute to the overall emissions total released in 2020

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: Facility is undergoing a significant renovation and modernization. Existing equipment is scheduled to be relocated and/or replaced. Following the renovation, additional pollution prevention measures may be assessed and implemented as required and where feasible. The facility service provider is certified ISO50001 which is an energy management system and energy consumption targets/goals are set.
